title: Refactor auth system to JWT-only with RBAC
description: Replace session-based authentication with JWT-only authentication, align user-store.ts roles with RbacRole ('admin'|'editor'|'viewer'), update auth-middleware.ts to remove sessionStore dependency and use jwtService exclusively, create new jwt-auth-store.ts for persistent JWT storage, and add database migration for roles column. This touches src/auth/, src/middleware/, src/collections/, and src/migrations/ directories.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JWT creation/verification pattern to reuse
src/auth/auth-service.ts - Payload-based auth with JWT, stores refresh tokens in users collection
src/auth/_auth.ts - extractBearerToken and checkRole pattern for JWT middleware
